sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106589" key="u(lakthth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑλακτ-ητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106589.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a barker,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεῖον ὑ. δήμου κύνα,</foreign> of Heraclitus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.479</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodorid.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
